holdings.infoBox: ENHU is an equity ETF with a total of 298 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.40%, Apple at 6.60%, Microsoft at 4.66%, Amazon.com at 3.88%, and Alphabet at 3.74%.

overview.description: The iShares Enhanced Large Cap Core Active ETF (ENHU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that uses quantitative AI and machine learning to invest in US large-cap stocks. The fund seeks to outperform the Russell 1000 Index while holding its securities. ENHU was launched on Nov 4, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.
